issues.explanation: The 23.3% year-to-date figure is not found in either cited chunk (C026 or C028). C026 mentions American Express is at an all-time high with price target raises but does not provide the YTD percentage. C028 discusses Dow and S&P 500 performance but does not mention American Express stock performance. While this figure appears in previously verified facts from other sections, the chunks cited in this paragraph do not support this specific claim.
issues.recommended_fix: Either cite the chunks that originally contained the 23.3% YTD figure, or add a calculation reference if this was derived from price data. Alternatively, restructure citations to include chunks that actually contain this performance metric.

issues.offending_span: Much of this upward movement has been driven by optimism around consumer spending and strategic travel partnerships
issues.explanation: Neither C026 nor C028 mentions consumer spending optimism or strategic travel partnerships as drivers of the stock movement. C026 only references Jim Cramer's commentary on price target raises. This claim appears in previously verified facts but is not supported by the chunks cited in this paragraph.
issues.recommended_fix: Cite the chunks from the Recent Developments or Business & Competitive Analysis sections that contain information about consumer spending and travel partnership drivers, or remove this claim if no supporting evidence is available in the cited sources.
